data.content: Shipped on main as merge commit 06a663ef3c42 after merging work/foolery-70ec. The history debugger now binds to the user-selected conversation instead of always using the first session, with integration coverage added for the selector and selected-session debug flow. Pushed to origin/main and verified GitHub Actions CI run 23106253250 passed for commit 06a663ef3c42 on 2026-03-15. CI emitted non-blocking annotations for existing coverage regression warnings and a future Node 20 deprecation notice on actions/checkout@v4.
